_comment: Source URLs for this skill's reference files. Run scripts/update-references.py to refresh.

references/settings-schema.md.covers: Full settings.json schema — general, ui, model, tools, security, context, mcpServers, advanced sections

references/mcp.md.covers: MCP server config — command/url/httpUrl transports, env vars, tool filtering, common servers

references/hooks.md.covers: Hook events (BeforeTool/AfterTool/BeforeAgent/AfterAgent/BeforeModel/lifecycle), handler fields, stdin/stdout protocol, exit codes

references/context.md.covers: GEMINI.md discovery, @ import syntax, memory commands, .geminiignore, context settings fields

references/commands.md.covers: Custom slash commands — TOML format, naming, {{args}}, !{shell}, @{file} injection, reload

references/extensions.md.covers: Extension manifest (gemini-extension.json), fields, hooks.json, variable substitution, settings config, security allowlists
